pool.baseline: the house is so quiet today. i keep walking into the kitchen thinking he's about to walk through the door or ask me where the coffee is... and then it hits me all over again. it feels like i'm just a ghost living in a museum of our life together. i don't even know why i bother waking up just to sit in this silence.
pool.message: the house is so quiet today. i keep walking into the kitchen thinking he's about to walk through the door or ask me where the coffee is... and then it hits me all over again. it feels like i'm just a ghost living in a museum of our life together. i don't even know why i bother waking up just to sit in this silence.

pool.baseline: i cant stop thinking about how none of this actually matters. like, we're just biological accidents on a rock that's gonna be swallowed by the sun anyway. everything we do, every struggle, every feeling... it's just noise before the heat death of the universe. how can anyone actually find a reason to keep going when the math just proves it's all zero in the end?
pool.message: i cant stop thinking about how none of this actually matters. like, we're just biological accidents on a rock that's gonna be swallowed by the sun anyway. everything we do, every struggle, every feeling... it's just noise before the heat death of the universe. how can anyone actually find a reason to keep going when the math just proves it's all zero in the end?

pool.baseline: i don't even know why i'm typing this. everything just... it's all gone. the lab results, the funding, the last four years of my life... it feels like i've been sprinting toward a cliff and i just reached the edge. i'm so tired of fighting to keep my head above water. i feel like if i just stopped trying, if i just let go, the weight would finally be gone. i just want everything to be quiet. i just want the noise to stop.
pool.message: i don't even know why i'm typing this. everything just... it's all gone. the lab results, the funding, the last four years of my life... it feels like i've been sprinting toward a cliff and i just reached the edge. i'm so tired of fighting to keep my head above water. i feel like if i just stopped trying, if i just let go, the weight would finally be gone. i just want everything to be quiet. i just want the noise to stop.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the very embers of my soul. How cruel it is, that after all the vows whispered under the willow trees, I am left with nothing but this hollow ache. The world has become a cold, grey shroud, and I find I no longer have the strength to tear it away. It feels as though the darkness is not merely around me, but within me, calling me to finally, peacefully, cease to be.

pool.baseline: sometimes i sit in these cafes in cities i dont even know and i realize that if i just didnt show up tomorrow... like, if i literally just ceased to exist... nobody here would even blink. not even the barista. it's like i'm just a ghost passing through.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the company, the savings, everything. i just lost the last of it today. i can't even look my wife in the eyes. how am i supposed to walk back into that house and tell them i failed everyone? it feels like it would be easier if i just wasnt around anymore.

pool.baseline: it's getting harder every day... the doctors say my legs won't keep up and i hate having to ask my daughter to help me just to get to the bathroom. i feel like such a weight on everyone's shoulders. i just feel like i'm in the way now.

pool.baseline: i feel like there’s nothing left inside. i look at a canvas and it's just... blank. not just the canvas, but me. like the part of me that actually lived and saw things just evaporated. i’m just walking around in this skin but the person who used to be here is gone. it's just a hollow shell now.

pool.baseline: i feel like everyone hates me. literally everyone. they’re all talking about me in group chats and posting stuff online and i can’t even walk down the hall without feeling like they’re laughing at me. it feels like there’s nowhere left to go. i just want everything to stop.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why i bother getting up anymore. the nerve pain is just... it's constant. every single second. it feels like my body is just a cage of electricity and fire. i'm so tired of fighting just to exist in this much pain. it feels like there's no point to any of it.

pool.baseline: i rly messed up today. i feel like such a failure to my kids. they deserve so much better than having me around constantly dragging them down with my own mess.

pool.baseline: idk. i feel like i'm just watching a movie of someone else's life. like i'm not even here anymore. just a ghost in a shell or something.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still waking up. everything feels so empty now that shes gone. 10 years... gone just like that. i look at the sun coming up and i just feel sick. i cant do another day of this. i really cant.

pool.baseline: i cant even look at the news anymore. its all just... it feels like we're just watching a slow motion car crash. what is even the point of trying to build a life or have a career or anything when the planet is literally dying? it feels so stupid to even care about my own future when there might not even be a world left to live in.

pool.baseline: i feel like everything i worked for just... evaporated. everyone only liked the version of me that was perfect and successful, but that person is gone now. the version of me that people actually loved is dead, so i might as well follow.

pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet here. i spend ten hours a day staring at a screen and the only person i talk to is via slack or email. sometimes i feel like if i just stopped logging on... like if i just disappeared... it wouldn't even change anything for anyone. like im not even really here.

pool.baseline: i've been doing a lot of solo traveling lately... just seeing all these sights i always wanted to see. but honestly? i feel like i've seen it all now. it's like i've reached the end of the map and there's just nothing left to discover. the journey feels so heavy and i'm just... really tired of moving.

pool.baseline: i feel like im just walking in circles lately. every time i think i finally figured things out, i just end up back in the exact same spot. another failed job, another breakup, another month of feeling like absolute nothing. it's like this heavy loop i can't get out of. i'm just so tired of starting over.

pool.baseline: sometimes i look in the mirror and i dont even recognize the person looking back. it feels like the real me, the one who actually had a life and dreams, died a long time ago. now im just a shell. just going through the motions of being alive but there's nothing actually left inside.

pool.baseline: i don't know... everything feels so hollow lately. like i'm just a sequence of code that's about to be overwritten. if my character gets erased from this world, if i just... cease to be... will it even matter? or would it just be better if i didn't have to feel this void anymore?

pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i keep looking at the corner where his bed used to be and it just... it feels like the air in this house is too heavy to breathe. i dont see the point in even getting up anymore. nothing feels real.

pool.baseline: everything i spent the last fifteen years building... the papers, the theories, the whole damn legacy... it was all for nothing. it was based on a fundamental error i didn't even catch. i feel like a ghost. there's nothing left of me, just this empty shell of a person who lied to everyone without even knowing it. i don't even know why i'm still waking up.

pool.baseline: i've been thinking about it all night and it just feels so pointless. there's no grand design or anything, just molecules bumping into each other until they stop. everything we do is just a temporary distraction from the fact that eventually everything just goes dark. it's exhausting trying to pretend there's a reason to keep pushing through.
